title: 振り逃げランナウェイ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm walking around the academy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Festivities worthy of the Mejiro name. And I
must also put on a genuine display of true
hospitality...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: SLAM!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, my apologies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I was just a little caught up in my thoughts...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh! Heya, McQueen! Whoa, why so serious?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've been tasked with greeting an international
visitor as the Umamusume representative of the
Mejiro estate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've spent such a long time trying to compose a
speech that will do justice to the Mejiro name,
and yet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, I getcha. I heard there's gonna be a party
too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
M'kay, come with me! Oh, and you might as well
tag along too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! The more the merrier! Please? I think you'd
be a big help!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So actually, I got some tickets for a baseball
game, but I've been strugglin' to decide who to
go with.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Baseball, at a time like this? No, I must fulfill my
duties as a Mejiro before—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I'm a prim and proper daughter of the
Mejiro family too. Although admittedly I don't
spend much time at home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But I think those experiences away from home are what helped me rediscover what makes me me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You might learn something by throwing caution
to the wind and sneaking out too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, you're a bit of a special case, wouldn't you
say? I doubt I would be granted leniency if I were
to run away from my duties.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You sure about that? 'Cause I'm pretty sure
Grandma wants all of us Mejiros to be happy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You know about that uncaught third strike rule in
baseball, right? Where the batter gets to run to
first base when they'd usually get struck out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you could look at it like that. You know,
turn a crisis into an opportunity by running away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You might be in a real sticky situation right now,
but if you put your head down and run, you might
just run into something new.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I suppose running away in such a fashion may be
acceptable. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's more than acceptable—it's exceptional! Come
on, run far, far away and clear that head of yours!
choice_data_list:
Just escape all your worries and relax, at least
for today.

Maybe taking things at your own pace really is
important.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Besides, I know you've got things under control, so you can run away!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well. If you insist, then I shall also allow
myself to have some fun today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: BRING 'EM HOME, YU-TA-KA!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Nice! Round the base! Keep going! Keep going!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After enjoying a breather at the baseball game,
Mejiro McQueen fulfills her important duties.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's always super important to go your own
way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Besides, everyone knows you're super serious.
Heck, that's what makes you so cool.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well... I suppose I could not fulfill my duties if I
were to overwhelm myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: THAT'S THE WAY, YU-TA-KA!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah, now you're gettin' pumped! That's the McQueen I know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen benefits from the change of
pace and embodies the best version of herself
when she gives her speech.
